65	    (f : M →ₗ[R] Mₛ) [IsLocalization S Rₛ] [IsLocalizedModule S f] [Module.Free R M]
66	    [Nontrivial Rₛ] :
67	    Module.finrank Rₛ Mₛ = Module.finrank R M := by
68	  simpa using congr(Cardinal.toNat $(Module.lift_rank_of_isLocalizedModule_of_free Rₛ S f))
69	
70	theorem Module.projective_of_isLocalizedModule {Rₛ Mₛ} [AddCommGroup Mₛ] [Module R Mₛ]
71	    [CommRing Rₛ] [Algebra R Rₛ] [Module Rₛ Mₛ] [IsScalarTower R Rₛ Mₛ]
72	    (S) (f : M →ₗ[R] Mₛ) [IsLocalization S Rₛ] [IsLocalizedModule S f] [Module.Projective R M] :
73	    Module.Projective Rₛ Mₛ :=
74	  Projective.of_equiv (IsLocalizedModule.isBaseChange S Rₛ f).equiv
75	
76	instance [Module.Projective R M] : Module.Projective (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S M) :=
77	  Module.projective_of_isLocalizedModule S (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap S M)
78	
79	instance {A : Type*} [CommRing A] [Algebra R A] [Module.Projective R A] :
80	    Module.Projective (Localization S) (Localization (Algebra.algebraMapSubmonoid A S)) :=
81	  Module.projective_of_isLocalizedModule S (IsScalarTower.toAlgHom R A _).toLinearMap
82	
83	theorem LinearMap.split_surjective_of_localization_maximal
84	    (f : M →ₗ[R] N) [Module.FinitePresentation R N]
85	    (H : ∀ (I : Ideal R) (_ : I.IsMaximal),
86	    ∃ (g : _ →ₗ[Localization.AtPrime I] _),
87	      (LocalizedModule.map I.primeCompl f).comp g = LinearMap.id) :
88	    ∃ (g : N →ₗ[R] M), f.comp g = LinearMap.id := by
89	  change LinearMap.id ∈ LinearMap.range (LinearMap.llcomp R N M N f)
90	  refine Submodule.mem_of_localization_maximal _ (fun P _ ↦ LocalizedModule.map P.primeCompl) _ _
91	    fun I hI ↦ ?_
92	  rw [LocalizedModule.map_id]
93	  have : LinearMap.id ∈ LinearMap.range (LinearMap.llcomp _
94	    (LocalizedModule I.primeCompl N) _ _ (LocalizedModule.map I.primeCompl f)) := H I hI
95	  convert this
96	  · ext f
97	    constructor
98	    · intro hf
99	      obtain ⟨a, ha, c, rfl⟩ := hf
100	      obtain ⟨g, rfl⟩ := ha
101	      use IsLocalizedModule.mk' (LocalizedModule.map I.primeCompl) g c
102	      apply ((Module.End.isUnit_iff _).mp <| IsLocalizedModule.map_units
103	        (LocalizedModule.map I.primeCompl) c).injective
104	      dsimp
105	      conv_rhs => rw [← Submonoid.smul_def]
106	      conv_lhs => rw [← LinearMap.map_smul_of_tower]
107	      rw [← Submonoid.smul_def, IsLocalizedModule.mk'_cancel', IsLocalizedModule.mk'_cancel']
108	      apply LinearMap.restrictScalars_injective R
109	      apply IsLocalizedModule.ext I.primeCompl (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap I.primeCompl N)
110	      · exact IsLocalizedModule.map_units (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap I.primeCompl N)
111	      ext
112	      simp only [LocalizedModule.map_mk, LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_restrictScalars,
113	        Function.comp_apply, LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap_apply, LinearMap.llcomp_apply,
114	        LocalizedModule.map_mk]

6	module
7	
8	public import Mathlib.RingTheory.Kaehler.Basic
9	public import Mathlib.RingTheory.Localization.BaseChange
10	
11	/-!
12	# Kähler differential module under base change
13	
14	## Main results
15	- `KaehlerDifferential.tensorKaehlerEquivBase`: `(S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]) ≃ₗ[S] Ω[B⁄S]` for `B = S ⊗[R] A`.
16	- `KaehlerDifferential.tensorKaehlerEquiv`: `(B ⊗[A] Ω[A⁄R]) ≃ₗ[B] Ω[B⁄S]` for `B = S ⊗[R] A`.
17	- `KaehlerDifferential.isLocalizedModule_of_isLocalizedModule`:
18	  `Ω[Aₚ/Rₚ]` is the localization of `Ω[A/R]` at `p`.
19	
20	-/
21	
22	@[expose] public section
23	
24	variable (R S A B : Type*) [CommRing R] [CommRing S] [Algebra R S] [CommRing A] [CommRing B]
25	variable [Algebra R A] [Algebra R B]
26	variable [Algebra A B] [Algebra S B] [IsScalarTower R A B] [IsScalarTower R S B]
27	
28	open TensorProduct
29	
30	attribute [local instance] SMulCommClass.of_commMonoid
31	
32	attribute [local irreducible] KaehlerDifferential
33	
34	namespace KaehlerDifferential
35	
36	/-- (Implementation). `A`-action on `S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]`. -/
37	noncomputable
38	abbrev mulActionBaseChange : MulAction A (S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]) :=
39	  (TensorProduct.comm R S Ω[A⁄R]).toEquiv.mulAction A
40	
41	attribute [local instance] mulActionBaseChange
42	
43	@[simp]
44	lemma mulActionBaseChange_smul_tmul (a : A) (s : S) (x : Ω[A⁄R]) :
45	    a • (s ⊗ₜ[R] x) = s ⊗ₜ (a • x) := rfl
46	
47	@[local simp]
48	lemma mulActionBaseChange_smul_zero (a : A) :
49	    a • (0 : S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]) = 0 := by
50	  rw [← zero_tmul _ (0 : Ω[A⁄R]), mulActionBaseChange_smul_tmul, smul_zero]
51	
52	@[local simp]
53	lemma mulActionBaseChange_smul_add (a : A) (x y : S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]) :
54	    a • (x + y) = a • x + a • y := by
55	  change (TensorProduct.comm R S Ω[A⁄R]).symm (a • (TensorProduct.comm R S Ω[A⁄R]) (x + y)) = _
56	  rw [map_add, smul_add, map_add]
57	  rfl
58	
59	/-- (Implementation). `A`-module structure on `S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]`. -/
60	noncomputable
61	abbrev moduleBaseChange :
62	    Module A (S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]) where
63	  __ := (TensorProduct.comm R S Ω[A⁄R]).toEquiv.mulAction A
64	  add_smul r s x := by induction x <;> simp [add_smul, tmul_add, *, add_add_add_comm]
65	  zero_smul x := by induction x <;> simp [*]
66	  smul_zero := by simp
67	  smul_add := by simp
68	
69	attribute [local instance] moduleBaseChange
70	
71	instance : IsScalarTower R A (S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]) := by
72	  apply IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_smul
73	  intro r x
74	  induction x
75	  · simp only [smul_zero]
76	  · rw [mulActionBaseChange_smul_tmul, algebraMap_smul, tmul_smul]
77	  · simp only [smul_add, *]
78	
79	instance : SMulCommClass S A (S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]) where
80	  smul_comm s a x := by
81	    induction x
82	    · simp only [smul_zero]
83	    · rw [mulActionBaseChange_smul_tmul, smul_tmul', smul_tmul', mulActionBaseChange_smul_tmul]
84	    · simp only [smul_add, *]
85	
86	instance : SMulCommClass A S (S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]) where
87	  smul_comm s a x := by rw [← smul_comm]
88	
89	/-- (Implementation). `B = S ⊗[R] A`-module structure on `S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]`. -/
90	@[reducible] noncomputable
91	def moduleBaseChange' [Algebra.IsPushout R S A B] :
92	    Module B (S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]) :=
93	  Module.compHom _ (Algebra.pushoutDesc B (Algebra.lsmul R (A := S) S (S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]))
94	    (Algebra.lsmul R (A := A) _ _) (LinearMap.ext <| smul_comm · ·)).toRingHom
95	
96	attribute [local instance] moduleBaseChange'
97	
98	instance [Algebra.IsPushout R S A B] :
99	    IsScalarTower A B (S ⊗[R] Ω[A⁄R]) := by
100	  apply IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_smul

input.old_string:
**Mathlib status at commit `b80f227` (iter-191 Lane M↓ first scaffold).**
The 4-stage proof chain is now scaffolded as follows.

* Stage 1 (`stalkMap_flat_of_smooth`): smooth ⟹ flat at every stalk.
  Axiom-clean.
* Stage 2 (`exists_isStandardSmooth_at_of_smooth`): smooth ⟹ standard
  smooth presentation locally. Axiom-clean.
* Stage 3-4 (Stacks `02JK`/`00OE`): polynomial generators ⟹ regular
  sequence ⟹ regular local ring. The Jacobian-criterion content
  ("standard smooth presentation ⟹ the maximal ideal of every stalk is
  generated by a regular sequence of length = Krull dim") is the
  Mathlib gap, captured here as a *single named scoped* `sorry` consuming
  the Stage 1-2 axiom-clean outputs.

Once Stages 3-4 close upstream, this helper closes axiom-clean and every
downstream consumer (`smooth_codim_one_maximalIdeal_isPrincipal_and_ne_bot`,
`localRing_dvr_of_codim_one`) inherits the closure automatically.
input.new_string:
**Mathlib status at commit `b80f227` (iter-192 Lane M↓ Stage 3-4 expansion).**
The 6-stage proof chain is now scaffolded as follows.

* Stage 1 (`stalkMap_flat_of_smooth`): smooth ⟹ flat at every stalk.
  Axiom-clean (iter-191).
* Stage 2 (`exists_isStandardSmooth_at_of_smooth`): smooth ⟹ standard
  smooth ring-hom presentation locally. Axiom-clean (iter-191).
* Stage 3 (`exists_algebra_isStandardSmooth_section_stalk_isLocalization_of_smooth`):
  scheme-to-algebra bridge: composes Stage 2 with the
  `RingHom.IsStandardSmooth.toAlgebra` bridge and the affine-open stalk
  localisation, producing an algebra-side `Algebra.IsStandardSmooth Γ(Spec, U)
  Γ(X.left, V)` + `IsLocalization.AtPrime` on the stalk. Axiom-clean
  (iter-192).
* Stage 4 (`module_free_kaehlerDifferential_of_isStandardSmooth`):
  standard-smooth algebra ⟹ Kähler differentials `Ω[Γ(X.left, V)⁄Γ(Spec, U)]`
  are `Module.Free` over the section algebra. Axiom-clean (iter-192).
* Stage 5-6 (Stacks `02JK`/`00OE`): local-cotangent freeness + dimension
  formula ⟹ regularity at the stalk. Two specific Mathlib gaps remain at
  commit `b80f227`:
    (a) Free Ω transports through localisation at a prime via
        `Module.free_of_isLocalizedModule` +
        `KaehlerDifferential.isLocalizedModule_of_isLocalizedModule`; needs
        IsScalarTower plumbing and a localisation of `Γ(Spec, U)` along the
        contraction of the prime;
    (b) Smooth-algebra dimension formula `ringKrullDim Aₚ = relative dim`
        (Stacks 00OE), not yet packaged in Mathlib.

Once Stages 5-6 close upstream, this helper closes axiom-clean and every
downstream consumer (`smooth_codim_one_maximalIdeal_isPrincipal_and_ne_bot`,
`localRing_dvr_of_codim_one`) inherits the closure automatically.
